CustomObject.description: Reference demo object for issue #125: bridges a native Salesforce Approval Process to a durable Revenant workflow (see NativeApprovalWorkflowExample.cls). Approval_Status__c is the field the native Approval Process's final approval/rejection actions update; Revenant_Approval_Decision_To_Signal_Example reacts to that change and signals the suspended workflow. Correlation_Key__c is the workflow correlation key, author-defined and optional (falls back to the record Id when blank).
CustomObject.label: Approval Request
